titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the United States Political Adviser, Allied Force Headquarters ( (Kirk))

div.head: The Secretary of State to the United States Political Adviser, Allied Force Headquarters ( Kirk )
div.p: 38. For Berry. American Interests—Rumania. Reurtel 34 November 27.Not printed; Mr. Berry reported the desire of a score of Americans for information concerning their early repatriation (340.1115A/11–2744). To extent your facilities permit you are hereby authorized to accept messages from American nationals to be forwarded to Department in paraphrase by airgram.

With regard to possible repatriation of American nationals in Rumania, please discuss question with AmPolad, and ascertain the views of the Allied Control Commission and appropriate Rumanian authorities, keeping Department informed of all developments, particularly difficulties to be overcome, in order that it may at any given moment be able to assess current situation and handle inquiries adequately. Department has drawn up list of priorities for use in connection with eventual repatriation of American nationals from Italy which you should obtain from AmPolad for use in registering applicants appearing before you.
Remainder your 34 has been subject of telegram to Legation Bern.
